zh.lifeSummary: Morfydd Verch Ap Rhys是Sir Rhys ap Meredith的女兒，於大約1243年出生在英國威爾斯卡馬特史爾德雷斯爾。她和Tudur Ap Madog Ap Iarddur至少有4個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於大約1300年在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾可華拉安享年59歲，埋葬在英國威爾斯凱爾納方史爾可華拉安。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Morfydd Verch Ap Rhys是Sir Rhys ap Meredith的女儿，于大约1243年出生在英国威尔斯卡馬特史爾德雷斯爾。她和Tudur Ap Madog Ap Iarddur至少有4个儿子和2个女儿。她去世于大约1300年在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾可華拉安享年59岁，埋葬在英国威尔斯凱爾納方史爾可華拉安。

nameMeanings.name: Ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Long, Minh, Muoi, Phan, Phat, Vinh, Cuong, Hien, Hoa, Lam, Lan.  Chinese Wing, Chi, Kin, Cheuk, Chi Wai, Chuen, Hon, Keung, Wah, Wai, Chiu, Ho.
Chinese: alternative Mandarin form of the surname 敖, see   Ao  .
Chinese: Cantonese form of the surnames 歐 and 區, see   Ou   1 and 2.

variants.name: Auerbach
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Moshe, Emanuel, Isidor, Bronia, Chaim, Faigy, Menachem, Meyer, Yechezkel.
German: habitational name from any of several places in southern Germany and Austria called Auerbach ‘the stream at the water meadow’. See also 2,   Au  , and   Bach  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from the town of Auerbach in the Upper Palatinate, Bavaria. Compare   Averbach  .

variants.name: Ao
meanings: Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 敖, meaning both ‘rambling’ and ‘deposed king without posthumous titles’ in ancient Chinese: (i) from the personal name of Tai Ao (太敖), teacher of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437 BC ). (ii) it is said that the surname is also borne by descendants of deposed kings of the former state of Chu, with no posthumous titles, during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476 BC ).

variants.name: Auer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Alois, Hans, Erwin, Matthias, Siegfried, Bernd, Bernhard, Erna, Franz, Fritz, Hermann, Horst.

German (mainly Bavaria): topographic name for someone living by a water meadow, German Au, or a habitational name for someone from a place called Au or Aue (see Au and Aue ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), Czechia, and Slovenia.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: Morfydd Verch Ap Rhys was born about 1243, in Dryslwyn, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir Rhys ap Meredith. She had at least 4 sons and 2 daughters with Tudur Ap Madog Ap Iarddur. She died about 1300, in Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 59, and was buried in Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Morfydd Verch Ap Rhys est née environ 1243, à Dryslwyn, Carmarthenshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, fille de Sir Rhys ap Meredith. Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles avec Tudur Ap Madog Ap Iarddur. Elle est décédée environ 1300, à Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 59 ans, et a été enterrée à Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Morfydd Verch Ap Rhys wurde um 1243 in Dryslwyn, Carmarthenshire, Wales, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Sir Rhys ap Meredith geboren. Sie hatte mit Tudur Ap Madog Ap Iarddur mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1300 im Alter von 59 Jahren in Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Wales, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Morfydd Verch Ap Rhys è nata il circa 1243 nel Dryslwyn, Carmarthenshire, Galles, Regno Unito come figlia di Sir Rhys ap Meredith. Lei avuto almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie con Tudur Ap Madog Ap Iarddur. Morì circa 1300, nel Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 59 anni, e fu sepolta a Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Galles, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Morfydd Verch Ap Rhysは約1243年にイギリスウェールズカーマースエンシュアイアドリスルウインでSir Rhys ap Meredithの娘として生まれた。彼女はTudur Ap Madog Ap Iarddurとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1300年にイギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアコチウィランで59歳で死去し，イギリスウェールズケエルナルフォンシュアイアコチウィランにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Morfydd Verch Ap Rhys(은)는 대략 1243년 영국 웨일스 카마테실르 드리스w이에서 Sir Rhys ap Meredith의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Tudur Ap Madog Ap Iarddur(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1300년 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 코ch윌런에서 59세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 웨일스 카이른아르폰실르 코ch윌런에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Morfydd Verch Ap Rhys nasceu aproximadamente 1243, em Dryslwyn, Carmarthenshire, Gales, United Kingdom filha de Sir Rhys ap Meredith. Ela teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas com Tudur Ap Madog Ap Iarddur. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1300, em Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 59 anos, e foi sepultada em Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Gales, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Morfydd Verch Ap Rhys родилась около 1243 г. в местности дрислвин, кармартеншир, Уэльс, Великобритания. Её отца звали Sir Rhys ap Meredith. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери от Tudur Ap Madog Ap Iarddur. Она умерла около 1300 г. в местности кочвиллан, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 59 лет и была похоронена в местности кочвиллан, каирнарфоншир, Уэльс, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Morfydd Verch Ap Rhys nació aproximadamente 1243, en Dryslwyn, Carmarthenshire, Gales, Reino Unido como hija de Sir Rhys ap Meredith. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas con Tudur Ap Madog Ap Iarddur. Murió aproximadamente 1300, en Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 59 años, y fue sepultada en Cochwillan, Caernarfonshire, Gales, Reino Unido.
